afterSwap(address,(address,address,uint2.details: Called after swap completes - NO fee collection here (done in beforeSwap)  ✅ V4 PATTERN: Fees collected in beforeSwap via BeforeSwapDelta ✅ afterSwap only handles: limits, tracking, state updates /**This is where the multi-position magic happens!

beforeSwap(address,(address,address,uint.details: Simplified multi-position system: P1 has hook tax, P2+ has LP fee only

claimBeneficiaryFeesToken(address,addres.details: Anyone can call (fees are per-beneficiary per token)

returns.taxBps: Current tax in bps (or 0 if graduated)

registerLaunch((address,address,uint24,i.details: Only callable by factory during deployment

params.inProgress: True to bypass restrictions, false to re-enable

setGlobalExemption(address,bool).details: Once set to true, CANNOT be reverted - exemption is PERMANENT      Exempt addresses bypass ALL taxes and limits on ALL tokens

params.exempt: True to exempt (permanent), false has no effect if already exempt

MIN_START_MCAP().notice: Minimum starting MCAP to prevent shallow liquidity graduation (1 ETH)

MIN_SWAP_AMOUNT().notice: Minimum swap amount to prevent dust griefing (0.0001 ETH or tokens)

TOTAL_SUPPLY().notice: Total supply per token (1 billion with 18 decimals)

activationInProgress(bytes32).notice: Dev activation override flag (bypass tax + limits during dev seed buy)

afterSwap(address,(address,address,uint2.notice: Enforce maxWallet limit and track user balancesPost-swap: Epoch tracking and position management

beforeSwap(address,(address,address,uint.notice: Pre-swap hook - enforces rules ONLY in P1 (pre-graduation)

beneficiaryFeesETH(address).notice: Accumulated ETH fees per beneficiary (currency = ETH)

beneficiaryFeesToken(address,address).notice: Accumulated token fees per beneficiary per token

getCurrentEpoch(bytes32).notice: Get current epoch for a pool

getCurrentLimits(bytes32).notice: Get current position limits for a pool

getCurrentTax(bytes32).notice: Get current tax for a pool

getPoolIdForToken(address).notice: Get PoolId for a token (for LP Locker integration)

globalExemptions(address).notice: Addresses permanently exempt from ALL taxes and limits across ALL tokens

isGraduated(bytes32).notice: Check if a pool is graduated

isGraduatedByToken(address).notice: Check if a token is graduated (for LP Locker integration)

platformFeesToken(address).notice: Accumulated platform token fees per token

setActivationInProgress(bytes32,bool).notice: Set activation override flag (dev seed buy in progress)

setGlobalExemption(address,bool).notice: Set permanent global exemption for an address (SAFE treasury only)

tokenToPoolId(address).notice: Token to PoolId mapping (for LP Locker integration)
